text: and many of you will likely have never seen this before there's not a lot of information about it

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's technically video footage, but it's not.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It looks as if someone is playing this video on a monitor and showing paused shots, okay?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And then someone is actually videoing it with a camera.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: So we're basically getting second-hand video shots of a monitor.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so as mysterious as it is, just on its face and all of the photographs that we're seeing in this video do look to show a discovery of some type of body in the snow.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And, you know, just from being alive back in 1992, I can say that at the very least, they do look legitimately like they were from that year from the way the men are dressed.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Just from the video quality, it almost looks like an old VHS tape.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: At certain points in the imagery, it looks as if the body is hung up on a rope, possibly an electrical line of some sort.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: We have multiple men gathered around, the EBE as we will call it.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And by the way, EBE stands for Extraterrestrial Biological Entity.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And just is a moniker widely used within the UFO research field.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: So from now on, we will call this the EBE.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so after doing a little digging, I discovered some more information that kind of gives us a little bit of a backstory about this.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: You know, the info on this is scant.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: There is no doubt.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: But today, we'll just go through what we know so far and what at least I could find.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so firstly, it's said that the witnesses of this sighting of this incident did not want to release the photos to the public at the advice of a local UFO investigator.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so a friend then decided to secretly video using a VHS camcorder the original photos.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And only recently did this person decide to make the video public.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And the video was said to have been released anonymously.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The EBE was said to have been found in a wooded field near a road by three snowmobilers.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The individuals in the photos were part of a local snowmobile club from Quebec.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: They happened upon the EBE in the late evening.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The conditions, it was very snowy out.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: They did not touch the EBE due to fear of contamination.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The individuals in this video have not been identified.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's said that the men hoisted the EBE with sticks and eventually with a rope or a cable.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The entity appeared to have been lying in the snow for quite some time.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's said that the individuals left the body due to the fear and risks of contamination.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And upon returning the following day, it was gone.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's also said that during this time, UFOs were reported in the area.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, again, whether this is real or not, we don't know.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: From what I found online, one person said that, well, it had been debunked after the creator of it came out some years later.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Although I haven't been able to find any information on that definitively.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: From what I can see, there's nothing in the footage that would tell me or at least indicate that it was fake.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Many people believe the video and photographs to be real.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: The physical anatomical details are said to preclude this from being a hoax.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And that in the early 1990s, the cost to hoax this EBE would have been very costly.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so the EBE was said to have been discovered in an area outside of Montreal near the Rouge River.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Which is a river in western Quebec, which empties into the Ottawa River near the Pont-aux-Chins and flows north of Mont-Treblant.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, here is the photograph of the EBE covered in snow as it was first discovered.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Where you can clearly see the outline, the head, the body.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And if you look down here toward the feet, it almost appears that the EBE has possibly boots or something, you know, of a dark nature covering its feet.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, while looking at this photograph of the face, we'll notice that the nostril slits are filled with snow.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, the eyelids, we notice this sort of gaze, you know, that you would see with many cadavers of when the eyes just sort of are gazing out into nothingness.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's very similar to what you would see post-mortem.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's said that the cheeks, you'll notice here, are swollen.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Likely due to freezing and thawing.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And there also appears to be some sort of trauma to the cheek here on the left side, where we see some red or bruising.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, you can also notice here that the eyes of the EBE look very similar to humans.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Well, that's another question that's been asked is that, are the whites that we're seeing in the corners of these black eyes simply snow that have gathered in the corners?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Or are these actual whites of the eyes?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's also been asked whether these eyes are covered with black contact lenses that these alien greys have been found wearing,

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: almost as a shielding of source, like you and me would wear a pair of glasses.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, likewise, as we're looking at the neck area here, there seems to be some similar anatomy to what you would find on humans,

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: such as the Adam's apple, and the esophagus, and the trachea.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: We can also see in some of the photos what appears to be a rib cage, or at least the ribs popping out through the skin.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Along with clear shoulder blades as well.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: So this thing is very anatomically correct, I guess you could say.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Which definitely errs on the side of it being real.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: But again, I will leave that up to you guys.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, there is a part of the video which shows the EBE being carried away.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Using this rope, or cable.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, what you're seeing here, again, appears to be something similar that would happen when a body is frozen.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Or experiences freezing temperatures where the tissues themselves become frozen and stiff.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And would support, again, the claim that this is legitimate footage.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, in some of the photos, we can see one of the witnesses holding a flashlight.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Which has been identified as a Collier-type flashlight.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Widely used, or at least used, in 1992.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It's said from analysis that there are four to five witnesses in these photographs.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And more may have been involved, but we just don't see them in the footage.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And here we have another image done by another researcher online that is pointing out some more anatomical features in the neck and of the eyes.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: That further point to this being a legitimate EBE, or just a very well done hoax.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Because it takes a lot of time, not just to create something, but to put the muscle structure in, the bone structure, to make it 100% anatomically correct.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It takes a lot of time, a lot of money, especially back in 1992.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And not to mention, this was not touted like the 1995 footage of the alien autopsy.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And sold for money and films made of it.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: You know, why go through all of that money just to release it years later anonymously?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It doesn't make a lot of sense.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And likewise, we see these muscles as well in the upper and lower legs.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Now, another thing that was noticed while looking at these photos, was that we have what has been called a skin anomaly.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Where it almost, in parts here, looks like there are cuts, or almost like a wrapping.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Like you would see on a mummy, or a mummified body, where they wrap it in cloth.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And you can notice that here.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so, I'm not sure if this is some sort of tearing, or if indeed, this is some sort of external wrap

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: that the EBE used to maybe shield it from the elements while visiting the planet.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: I just don't know, but it is strange.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so, yeah, without further information, we don't know for sure whether this is real or a hoax.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: It sure looks like from the footage that this was a real discovery, at least in my opinion.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: I don't have anything to the contrary at this point that would sway me in the opposite direction.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: If it was a hoax, you would think that they just would have taken pictures right there at the scene,

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: and not videoed them second-hand off of a video monitor,

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: which was said to have been done under the advice of a UFO investigator.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Another question is, where did the body go?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Where are the witnesses?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And why hasn't this footage gotten more notoriety?

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And that's what I'm hoping to do with the posting of this.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: So, very interesting finding.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: An explosive smoking gun finding, if this turns out to be legit.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: And so in the end, you guys are just going to have to watch the video.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: Tell me what you think.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
text: If I have any more updates, you can be sure I will post them.

transcript_title: Ebe 1992 Eagle This Dark Web Footage Still Haunts Me Alien Being Found In 1990s
